center.name: 阿姆哈拉州
center.summary: 阿姆哈拉州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Ankober serin，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: 454 This bird is endemic to Ethiopia, inhabiting steep rocky slopes and high cliff-tops; the reported range of the Ankober serin consists of several disjointed areas in northern Shewa and in the northern Amhara Region. It is threatened by habitat loss
